step_rationale: Active vitamin D; systemic mineral homeostasis and endothelial function, not core atherothrombotic mechanism.
mechanism: Active vitamin D (1,25-dihydroxyvitamin D3) modulates vascular calcification and endothelial health through systemic calcium-phosphate and immune pathways.

references.title: Calcitriol Concentration in the Early Phase of Myocardial Infarction and Its Relation to Left Ventricular Ejection Fraction.
